items.text:
🚨URGENT EXTRA OPPORTUNITY🚨

MAIDSTONE TELEVISION STUDIOS

Want to be an extra for a live TV show watched by thousands? UCA Maidstone are looking for extras for our tv show that goes live THIS @ Thursday 2PM!! 

Major opportunity that will be watched by television and film professionals scouting future talent. 

“High Noon Saloon” is a live gameshow where four cowboys wrangle, bluff, bet, and backstab their way to the ultimate bounty across five wild rounds; and you get a front row seat to watch every messy moment make it to screen.

SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICK, FOR AN OPPORTUNITY TO WORK IN A LIVE TV STUDIO CLICK THE LINK TO SIGN UP, NO AUDITION NEEDED. 

(Please bring western themed clothing, hats etc where possible!) 

SEE YOUAT THE HOE DOWN🤠🐎🌵🏜️ 

ROLE IS UNPAID.
items.previewDescription: Hoe Down and watch High Noon Saloon being filmed LIVE! All tickets are FREE and are seated.

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL ‼️
Looking for local talent - please only apply if you are based within Greater Manchester or Manchester

Project: Short film

Title: Remember Me?

Location: Farnworth, Bolton, Greater Manchester

Shoot date: 25th April 2026

Compensation: £12.71 p/h + food provided on set + travel expenses (via public transport only)

Contract provided

🚨 Disclaimer: The pay offer also applies to previous applicants

How to apply:

Please send an email to RMfilmproduction@outlook.com including your name, headshot and/or showreel :)

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

May be an image of text that says 'About: 'Remember Me?' is a short 5- 6 minute satirical comedy that plays with the illogical tropes and stereotypes found in action films, such as overly exaggerated characters, questionable disguises, and the way they are portrayed on screen. fast-paced comedy set almost entirely in one flat that begins like a tense, high-stakes thriller but spirals into completely silly chaos. It's a self aware, character driven comedy that gives actors the opportunity to explore meta humor and neighteneo personalities, all while lightly poking fun at the conventions of the action genre.'

May be an image of text that says 'Italian Man/Woman:1line Man/ Woman: line The Italian' S role feels almost theatrical. Their gestures and the accent could feel stereotypical, a light poke at the disguise portrayals in films. Like others, they enter the chain of confrontations by targeting person who spoke before them They might seem over the top but their personality makes them memorable. the How to apply: Please send an email to RMfilimproduction@outook.com including your name, headshot ourname,headshotand/orshowrel and/ showreel:)'

items.text:
# Casting People 65+ with a Distinct Look

We are seeking individuals age 65 and over for an upcoming fine art photography project by an emerging artist.
This series explores individuality, personal style, and the dreams people carry with them throughout life. We are especially drawn to people with a strong visual identity — those who have shaped themselves in an interesting way, whether through style, performance, transformation, or unconventional life paths.
If you feel like you don’t look like everyone else, we’d love to hear from you. We're especially interested in people with unusual and distinct faces and style.
No acting or modeling experience is required — we simply want you to be yourself.
The project will take place in Santa Monica, LA on Monday 20th. Participants will be paid $100 for a half-day session, with overtime compensated at $20 per hour. Lunch will be provided, along with gas money.
If you’re interested, please dm me with:
-Your name and age
-A recent photo (a phone photo is perfectly fine)
-A short note about yourself
We’re also happy to answer any questions.

sharedPost.text:
KAMED STUDIO – POSZUKIWANY POLICJANT 🎬

​Na plan nowego serialu poszukujemy statysty, który wcieli się w rolę młodego policjanta. 
Scenę gramy w malowniczym Milanówku!

​📅 TERMIN: 21 kwietnia
📍 MIEJSCE: Milanówek - dojazd we własnym zakresie (dobry dojazd WKD!)
💰 STAWKA: 120 zł (płatne po planie)

​Kogo szukamy?
​Młodego mężczyzny o aparycji policjanta (atutem będzie krótka, schludna fryzura).
​
​Jak się zgłosić?
​Wyślij SMS pod numer: 731 738 797
​W treści wpisz:
​Imię i nazwisko
​Wiek
​Miejscowość zamieszkania
​
​📸 Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line is Seeking Acrobats/Gymnasts/Aerialists
NCLH Shows & Experiences is seeking male identifying seeking gymnasts, aerialists, acrobats, and tramp wall performers for the all-new productions aboard NCL's newest ship, the Norwegian LUNA.  

Please visit [https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/](https://nclgymnastsaerialistsacrobats.castingcrane.com/) to apply!

Mainstage productions include ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second mainstage production, HIKO, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary movement. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Paul Bezzant

Original Aerial Direction: AntiGravity Orlando

Rehearsals begin May 16, 2026

Onboard: $1,350/week ($5,850/month) 

All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule. 

GYMNASTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Tramp Wall, Chinese Pole, Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance ability is a plus but not required.

AERIALISTS: Any ethnicity. Male identifying. 5’8 to 6'2. Athletic, dynamic, versatile gymnasts with expertise in a wide range of skills including Straps, Bungee, Cube, and Acro. Must have upper body strength and physical presence. The ability to engage with an audience, embody a character, and tell a story is a must. Dance training and understanding of body lines and positions are a huge plus. 

Must be 18 years or older to apply.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'NCL AUDITIONS NORWEGIAN CRUISE CRUISELINE LINE Resani SEVUN ASCE C CT អរា CRUISES® GYMNASTS, AERIALISTS, ACROBATS LAS VEGAS APRIL 21, 2026 Audition Auditiondetails details *By Appointment Only NCLH SHOWS &EXPERIENCES CREATIVE CREATIVESTUDIOS- CRE VE TUDIOS'

items.text:
Hey everyone I’m back!

We are still accepting tapes for my upcoming St. Joan period piece shot on 16mm film in Florida! More details in the shared post.

It’s not too late to audition for Joan but just letting potential applicants know, we have locked down on a potential candidate already unless someone better comes along.

We are mainly looking for more applicants for Isabelle Romée and the Nun, to give us more options.

We hope to hear from you soon!

sharedPost.text:
And the pivotal moment is here, the official casting call for St. Joan! Do not hesitate to reach out to our contacts if you want to apply for the listed parts (and don’t forget to share the GoFundMe!) and help bring this period piece to life. This will require a larger team than normal given the nature of the film, a period piece shot on film. 

Just a note that this is a historical and biographical film, so we are prioritizing actors who not only have studied these real historical figures and have done the necessary research to accurately reflect how they lived in life, but also somewhat resemble them in real life.

Share with anybody you think will be interested in applying for a part, or apply yourself if you match one of the positions. Filming is being done in Florida.

Non-union and at the moment, unpaid, until adequate funding is achieved via the GoFundMe. 

Catering and crafty will be provided, along with IMDb credits.

https://gofund.me/389fda838 

#indiefilm #indiefilmmaking #castingcall #castingnotice #biographicalfilm #stjoan #historicalfilm #16mmfilm #krasnogorsk3

If you have 5 minutes to fill out this survey (fully anonymous), that would help my research greatly! 📝

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1kiMgJ1_N9A9c1id9MkOI5nDhl3I5HJpsJHAEqWETPcI/edit?usp=drivesdk

Please share it with other actors you know 🙏🏼
items.previewDescription: This anonymous survey explores actors’ experiences during costume fittings, including comfort, communication, and emotional responses. Your responses will be used for academic research in costume design and performance studies. Some questions relate to personal comfort. You may skip any question y...

Posting for my son. He urgently needs a female actor available next Wednesday for filming (with possibly a read through via zoom prior) filming in Dunmow, Essex. My son is studying at London Screen Academy and is creating a short film for his end of year project. Due to a last minute cancellation he is now stuck without an actor. He is looking for a female actor aged 23-28. The material from the video will be provided for you to use in your personal showreel. — sorry that that we can’t afford to pay as it’s a college project but he will provide the footage for you to use as a showreel.

‼️URGENT CASTING CALL FOR STUDENT PROJECT‼️
**‼️CASTING CALL‼️**
(unpaid but can pay for travel if needed)

Hello, I’m a student at Coastland College doing my second year final major project!

Looking for an actor to play the main character in my short film, “**Toppled Choices**”.

**Plot:** The main character is retelling their previous day in therapy. That day, they made choices that led to a bystander's death, littering in the road, and causing a crash.

**(Script for specifics attached)**

**Main character: **Around the **age of 18-22**, no specified gender

**Date filming**: **26th April** + additional discussed date

**Location**: **Wareham**

**Requirements:** **Self-tape**, around the age of **18-22**

Thanks for any interest! Feel free to message or send me an email: **CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com**

items.text:
Hi, if you’re tired of getting job rejections and you’re ready to start your own business then you need to sign up for Launch It! Start Your Own Creative Business 8 Day FREE Bootcamp happening May 11th at Mango Studios LDN which includes 1 month free office/studio space!

Open for all Islington residents aged 18 +

Sign up here: mangostudiosldn.com

sharedPost.text:
👀HUGE OPPORTUNITY! 🚨

We are pleased to announce that we have partnered with @islingtoncouncil to make 2026 the year you start or grow your Creative Business!

We are running a FREE 8 Day Bootcamp for aspiring business owners to start their own business and struggling business owners to grow their business in the Creative Sector!🤩

Plus 1 month FREE workspace is available at our awesome studio in Finsbury Park! 🤯

Launch It! Start Your Creative Business Bootcamp is taking place right here at Mango Studios LDN in May 2026!! 🤑

This is your chance to join our FREE 8 Day Bootcamp where you will learn:

- How to start/grow a business
- How to create a brand 
- How to overcome obstacles
- How to hire the right people
- How to build a sales strategy
- How to have a resilient mindset
- How to go from idea to action!
And much more!!

When: Monday 11th May - Thursday 21st May 2026

Timing: 11am - 5pm 

Where: Mango Studios LDN, Tower House, 139 Fonthill Road, London, N4 3HF 

Who can apply: Islington Residents aged 18 and over. 

Cost: FREE plus you get Lunch provided by us! 😋

Applications are open now and close April 30th at 6pm. Link in bio to apply!

Spaces are limited to please act fast!

This 8 day bootcamp is designed to help you move from idea to action!

#london #business #creative

items.text:
Casting Call !!!
Looking for a talented actress for an upcoming music video shoot.

📍 Shoot Duration: 1 day

📅 When: Weekday (exact date to be confirmed)

🎥 Location: Various locations in London 

🎭 Age Group - 21–30

We’re seeking someone confident on camera with strong expressions and on-screen presence. Previous acting or modeling experience is a plus, but not required.

If you’re interested (or know someone who might be), please DM me with your portfolio, photos, or a short intro. 

OR 

email - dhlondonmotionpictures@gmail.com

Let’s create something amazing together! ✨

sharedPost.text:
📣📣CASTING📣📣

Zapraszamy na dwuetapowy casting, z pierwszym etapem online! Szukamy aktorki w wieku 18+ do zagrania w spektaklu - bajce kurdyjskiej na podstawie książki "Opowieści Dengbeżów. Baśnie i bajki kurdyjskie". Mile widziane są umiejętności animacji, gdyż w spektaklu wykorzystamy animację lalką.

Premiera spektaklu jest planowana na początek czerwca, próby do spektaklu w maju w weekendy oraz w trakcie majówki w Zamościu (woj. lubelskie) oraz Kielcach (woj. świętokrzyskie), stąd wymagamy dostępności w tym okresie.

Eksploatację spektaklu planujemy w lato 2026 w trakcie festiwali (m.in. Pol'and'Rock Festiwal w Strefie Warsztatów ASP) dlatego dostępność w czerwcu, lipcu i sierpniu również jest dla nas ważna.

📣📣 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila: fundacjabanina@gmail.com 📣📣

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: 
✅ twoje CV
✅ wizytówkę, w formie linku do YouTube

❗Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 23 kwietnia❗

Casting może się przedłużyć, w przypadku gdy w wyznaczonym czasie nie znajdziemy odpowiedniej osoby.

O zakończeniu castingu poinformujemy na naszych social mediach tj. Facebook i Instagram

🚨URGENT EXTRA OPPORTUNITY🚨

MAIDSTONE TELEVISION STUDIOS

Want to be an extra for a live TV show watched by thousands? UCA Maidstone are looking for extras for our tv show that goes live THIS @ Thursday 2PM!! 

Major opportunity that will be watched by television and film professionals scouting future talent. 

“High Noon Saloon” is a live gameshow where four cowboys wrangle, bluff, bet, and backstab their way to the ultimate bounty across five wild rounds; and you get a front row seat to watch every messy moment make it to screen.

SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICK, FOR AN OPPORTUNITY TO WORK IN A LIVE TV STUDIO CLICK THE LINK TO SIGN UP, NO AUDITION NEEDED. 

(Please bring western themed clothing, hats etc where possible!) 

SEE YOU AT THE HOE DOWN🤠🐎🌵🏜️ 

https://www.eventbrite.com/e/high-noon-saloon-live-tickets-1986891767763

ROLE IS UNPAID.

items.text:
NOW CASTING:
Looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Looking for different actors of all ages to volunteer to be background actors in one short scene filming in the Los Angeles area June 30th.

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Filming in the Los Angeles / SFV area. 

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
Schon mal eine Rolle angenommen…

und dich danach gefragt, ob du mehr hättest verlangen sollen? 

Du bist nicht allein!

Viele verlieren Geld, weil sie

❌ unsicher sind

❌ keine Strategie haben

❌ oder Angst haben, den Job zu verlieren

Deshalb haben wir ein gratis PDF erstellt,das dir zeigt, wie du deine Gage selbstbewusst verhandelst 💰❗️ 

Schreib deine Stadt + deinen Namen in die Kommentareund wir senden dir den Link 📩

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTFINDER Wieder eine zu niedrige Gage akzeptiert und später geärgert? Deshalb haben wir ein kostenloses PDF erstellt, in dem wir Schritt für Schritt zeigen: wie du deine Gage richtig einschätzt ✓ wie du souverän verhandelst und typische Fehler vermeidest Kommentiere jetzt deine Stadt + deinen Namen und du erhältst den Link'

Wir suchen für ein Infovideo bei einem Krankenhaus in Freiburg einen männlichen Statisten aus Freiburg im mittleren Alter. 

Die Rolle ist ohne Sprecherszenen und lediglich ein halber Tag. 

Für Kosteninformationen etc. mir bitte per PN schreiben.

items.text: SWR und Montavia suchen gemeinsam nach Komparsen und Kleindarsteller*innen für eine Fußballserie in Ludwigsburg. Gedreht wird ab Anfang Juni. Alle Bewerbungsinformationen findet Ihr hier:

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Komparsen und Kleindarsteller für SWR Montavia Fußballserie in Ludwigsburg gesucht Du bist über 18 Jahre, kommst aus Baden-Württemberg willst vor die Kamera und Fußball st für dich das Größte? Wir suchen Mitspieler und Gegner, Fans, Meckerrentner*innen Waffel Omas und Opas, und Alles was Ihr mit Amateurfußball und Kreisliga verbindet. Meldet Euch mit einem Foto oder einem kurzen Vorstellungsvideo unter: Drehbeginn: Juni 2026 Falls Ihr was am Ball könnt, lasst uns das uuuunbedingt sehen. Erzählt uns Eure schöste teFußballgeschichte. Außerdem bitte Telefonnummer, die Anschrift und das Geburtsdatum angeben. Wir freuen uns auf Eure Nachrichten! Mortania SWR>'

**Komparsen / Kleindarsteller gesucht in Dortmund**
Für einen **vergüteten Verkehrssicherheitsclip** suchen wir für **einen Drehtag Ende Mai** junge Leute im **Spielalter 18–25**.
Gesucht werden natürliche, zuverlässige, **kameraaffine** Menschen. Schauspielerfahrung ist nicht erforderlich.

Bei Interesse bitte schicken:
2 Fotos, Alter, Wohnort, Handynummer, gern kurzes Selfie-Video an: adrian@proimago.de

items.text:
CALLING ALL FILM DIRECTORS, PRODUCERS, ACTORS & SCREENWRITERS!

Submissions are now open for Manchester Global Film Festival at a DISCOUNTED early bird price. This festival is not just about showcasing films but also creating a space for the future of cinema. We hope to help bloom the next generation of artists. 

Hosted at the beautiful Cultplex Cinema on 17th October, we hope to create an intimate and personable experience for filmmakers new and old. If you or anyone you know has a film you’d like to submit, follow the link below to submit now! 🐝

https://filmfreeway.com/ManchesterInternational?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAdGRleARS8TRleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAadQEcZ3PXs4_Nl7YTNrJrZEzbdZxpDHJwkhTnjy1AePffVEhJO1JPjYDnCDCA_aem_54w6tYhxxa0CUhyigp4BCA&utm_id=97760_v0_s00_e0_tv3_a1denni5ey3o21
items.title: Northern Shorts Presents - Manchester Global

Casting call🎭🎬 — for a coming of age British teen drama series🎬
We are currently urgently casting for a supporting role in our series. 

Logline: In a world where every choice splits in two, four young friends must confront the dangerous collisions of their parallel selves - blurring the lines between who they want to be and who they are expected to be.

Role

Malik 

Black ( any ethnicity) 

45

Actors ages : 25 - 47 

Link to audition — https://forms.gle/cHtjAJjCbQwSqRhS9

Filming dates : July & August ( for this role you will only be needed a few days) exact dates TBD 

Compensation: Travel & Accommodation covered 

Location: Manchester,UK 

You can find us on Instagram & TikTok @dualitytheseries

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'MALIK Role: Omari's Father Age: 45 Ages eligible: 25- 25-47 47 Race: Black Traits: kind, Calm'

Headshots by D&Co!

Need a fresh headshot?

We’re offering professional headshots for actors, creatives, and businesses looking to update their image. Perfect for casting profiles, LinkedIn, company websites, and social media.

✅Super affordable! 
📍 Clean, natural, high-quality portraits

items.text:
Summer-Joules is on fire right now 🔥🎬
Since Thursday alone: Optioned for something major 🤞🏻
2 feature film auditions & a TV series with Majestic plus 2 auditions with her LA agency and 1 audition coming through from management in Canada 🎬
This is what hard work, focus, and real dedication look like. I don’t know how she does it! Not just showing up for yourself, but continuing to lift and support others along the way too.
Keep pushing, keep growing, and keep being unapologetically you. The momentum is real 💜💛

items.text:
WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

30% of our actors self-taped for one of the UK’s most loved TV soaps.
50+ PAID opportunities dropped into the group.

And one actor…
Asked how to price herself —
…and walked away billing DOUBLE 💰

This is what happens when you’re in the right room.

Actors outside are waiting.
Actors inside are moving.

The ones inside right now?
They’re on fire 🔥

If you’re serious about your acting career…
Stop watching from the outside.

👉 https://www.mzacting.com/matt-zinas-inner-circle.html
👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#actorslife #selftape #actingcareer #ukactors #auditions

items.title: WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

items.text:
CASTING CALL

For the forthcoming stage play

BREXITUS NEXITUS
A dark comedy set in Roman times with strikingly modern themes

Brexitus Nexitus takes a light-hearted yet biting look at whether Britain has really changed since the Roman occupation.
Spoiler alert: it hasn’t.

ROLES AVAILABLE

DIRECTOR

If you have the energy and vision to direct and assist cast a great play please apply

Seeking male/ female performers aged 25+ for the following characters:

POTUS 
 A corrupt and self - serving governor of much of Britain, distinguished by his obese stature, elaborate wig, orange complexion, fake blood capsule, ear bandage, bruised and bandaged hands, socks covering swollen ankles and a nappy…

FLOTUS
A bored, frustrated psychopathic wife of Governor Potus 

AGRIPPA
A dim but ambitious Roman general

MAXIMUS 
A scheming civil servant and the secret head of Intelligence.

HONORIOUS 
A shipwrecked missionary destined to become King Arthur.

The WITCH 
A spiritual, wise woman with a fondness for random poisoning.

PERFORMANCE DETAILS
📍 Hope Street Theatre, Liverpool

📅 2nd, 3rd & 4th July 2026

IMPORTANT INFORMATION
This is a profit-share production
Applicants must be local to Liverpool
Only suitable applicants will be contacted

HOW TO APPLY

Please DM Ian MacDonald  with your showreel(s) if available

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL🚨🎬

We’re looking for extras to join us for reshoots of our final year university film on April 27th (more details attached)

items.text:
Hume Baugh here: I'm doing a scene study class Tuesday May 12-Tuesday June 16, 2026 7-10 pm at The Practice Room 688 Richmond West Rm. 302, Toronto. We will be working on scenes and monologues. You can bring a couple of scenes to the first class, in which we will choose what to work on. You will have lots of time to work on your scene each class, and can work outside of class if you wish. The work will focus on objectives, the scene partner, and the actor's dynamic presence in the room, using one's authentic self. Come and join us - it will be fun, informal, and informative. Get in touch at humebaugh@yahoo.ca if you're interested.

I have been an actor, director and teacher for 43 years in Toronto and elsewhere. I have taught at George Brown, Sheridan College, Fanshawe College, and privately. My acting credits include Stratford, Shaw, Canadian Stage, Tarragon, Factory, Passe Muraille, Theatre Rusticle, Threshold Theatre, Young People's Theatre, Shakespeare in the Rough, Festival of Classics, Blue Ceiling Dance, Ecce Homo, and One Little Goat, among many others. 

I have directed Drums in the Night, Of Mice and Men, The Winter's Tale, (Fanshawe College), ABD with Mark the C (Threshold Theatre), All's Well That Ends Well (Alchemy), Child Hood (Summerworks), Twelfth Night, Therac 25 (Direct Flight Theatre). 

Cost is only $150, payable by etransfer to humebaugh@yahoo.ca upon acceptance into class, first come first served.

THIS IS A GREAT CLASS! Hume really knows his stuff! - Charlotte Moore

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

items.text:
Hi, my name is Megan Jenkins, and my partner is called Oscar Smith we are both looking for a young actor ages 16-17(a boy) who are local to Manchester to play a role in our student film.

We will be filming from the 28th-20th may 

We will be paying for food and transport.

Logline- When a quiet high‑school girl is found dead, her former friend haunted by their broken relationship joins the lead investigator to uncover the truth, only to reveal the terrifying murder that had happened.

The role

Liam: Liam is tall and brunette, Liam speaks with confidence and has a very big ego, when speaking to Emily he is excited and can let the confident facade fall he’s happy and giggly.

If you would like to audition or want more details, please email [meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com](mailto:meganmjenkins2009@gmail.com) and I will send you a section of the script.

Kind regards, Megan and Oscar

items.text:
🎤 Wir suchen DICH!

Für unseren neuen Videopodcast suchen wir eine kleinwüchsige Persönlichkeit mit Charakter – jemand, der locker, witzig und einfach echt ist.

Geplant sind regelmäßige Außendrehs, bei denen wir Leute auf der Straße ansprechen – dafür brauchen wir jemanden, der keine Scheu hat, auf Menschen zuzugehen und dabei für gute Stimmung sorgt 😄

👉 Wichtig ist uns:

- Du bist offen & spontan
- Du hast Humor und nimmst dich selbst nicht zu ernst
- Erfahrung? Nice to have, aber kein Muss

Ob weiblich, männlich oder divers – völlig egal. Hauptsache, du hast Bock drauf!

💡 Aktuell ist das Ganze unentgeltlich, da wir das Projekt komplett selbst aufbauen und noch nichts daran verdienen.

📍 Gedreht wird hauptsächlich im Raum Reutlingen (City, Straße, spontane Spots).

Wenn du denkst „das passt zu mir“ – schreib mir einfach eine PN!

items.text:
Hi zusammen,
wir suchen aktuell noch 5–6 Darsteller für einen Dreh diesen Mittwoch in Düsseldorf. Deshalb wollte ich einfach mal in die Runde fragen, ob jemand von euch Lust hätte, dabei zu sein.

Zum Dreh: Es handelt sich um ein Musikvideo. In der Szene geht es darum, dass mehrere „Politiker“ vor einem modernen Bürogebäude mit einem Künstler interagieren. Das Ganze ist bewusst überspitzt dargestellt – die Politiker stehen quasi Schlange, um bei ihm etwas zu „kaufen“. Wird aber alles so umgesetzt bzw. zensiert, dass nichts Explizites zu sehen ist.

Der Drehaufwand ist gering, maximal ca. 1 Stunde. Gage liegt bei 50 € pro Person.

Da der Aufwand relativ kurz ist, schauen wir aktuell vor allem nach Leuten, die möglichst aus der Nähe kommen, damit sich die Anreise auch lohnt.

Wichtig wäre nur, dass ihr einen Anzug habt.

Falls jemand Zeit und Lust hat, meldet euch gerne! Und wenn ihr noch jemanden kennt, der gut passen könnte, gerne weiterleiten.

Ansonsten wünsche ich euch einen schönen Tag!

topComments.text: Gerne dabei. Nähe Düsseldorf, Anzüge vorhanden.

items.title: Hi zusammen,

items.text:
Thinking about getting into voiceover but not based in Dublin?
We’re often asked about online options by people living in remote areas or those who simply can’t make it to an in-person class. So this June, we’re opening up our Online Introduction to Voiceover with PBL Voiceover Coach. Ireland's most highly rated Voiceover Coach. 

This affordable session is designed to give you a real, honest impression of what it takes to work in professional voiceover. No fluff, just practical insight, guided exercises, and direction from an industry professional.

What you’ll get:

A clear understanding of how the voiceover industry works

Live coaching and performance feedback

Tips on script interpretation and delivery

Insight into recording setups and audio quality

A chance to ask questions and get personalised guidance

If you have a USB microphone, great, it’ll help you get even more out of the session. But it’s not essential. You can still take part and learn a huge amount without one.

Places are deliberately kept very limited to ensure everyone gets proper attention and feedback.

If you’ve been curious about voiceover, this is your chance to step in and try it properly.

Book your place now:

https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach/

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'PBL VOICEOVER COACH & DEMOS ONLINE INTRODUCTION tO PROFESSIONAL VOICEOVER 1 김'

Insight into recording setups and audio quality

A chance to ask questions and get personalised guidance

If you have a USB microphone, great, it’ll help you get even more out of the session. But it’s not essential. You can still take part and learn a huge amount without one.

Places are deliberately kept very limited to ensure everyone gets proper attention and feedback.

If you’ve been curious about voiceover, this is your chance to step in and try it properly.

Book your place now:

https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach/
items.title: Thinking about getting into voiceover but not based in Dublin?

items.text:
CASTING IS OPEN FOR OUR DEBUT FEATURE FILM PAID POSITION

Filming is taking place in June and will be shot in the Woking Surrey area

we are looking for a boy child actor playing age between 5-10 To portray the character of Elijah, who is non-verbal and autistic, a variety of skills and qualities are necessary:

1. Research and Understanding: It's essential to have an understanding of autism, particularly non-verbal autism. This includes recognizing the diversity of experiences and behaviors within the autism spectrum. The role requires an empathetic approach to connect authentically with Elijah's experiences and emotions while being sensitive to the nuances of his communication style.

2. We require legal guardian/ parents to be present during auditions

3. we will be working with the local authorities and adhering to the strict rules enforced by local authorities via Child Performance Licences, which mandate maximum time on set, limits on on-camera time, and specific breaks for meals and rest etc�

please apply by sending your details and spotlight to our email address at tideswellproduction@gmail.com

thank you for reading and hope you are all have a fantastic rest of the week

sharedPost.text:
I'm doing a 2-day workshop at Makers' House in Hastings for people who want to develop a comedy character for the stage.
If you know anyone who would be interested, send 'em my way...

Workshop is May 6th and 7th, and I'm doing a Marcel performance the night of May 5th.

Details here:
https://www.makershousehastings.co.uk/allevents/p/character-in-comedy-with-alexis-dubus-5th-7th-may

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CHARACTER ACTERIN IN COMED MEDY WITH ALEXIS ALEXISDUBUS DUBUS'

sharedPost.text:
هااالو هاااالو
عندنا مسابقه
والي كسب معانا قبل كده عارف هدايانا اد ايه قيمه وكتيييييير
بيجيلك بوكس كامل مليان مافاجات وهدايا مختلفه من كل حاجه 🎁🎁🎁🎁 
يلااااا بينا نبدا بشروط المسابقه
🎈 1_شير للبوست ده  علي الستوري وصفحه الفيس و5 جروبات مختلفه 
🎈 2_اضافه20 صديق  من اصدقائك لصفحه الكرمه
🎈 3_30 كومنت علي البوست ده
الفايز هو اول واحد هيخلص شروط المسابقه عشان ماحدش يزعل 🙏
يلااااااا نبدء 💗💗💗💗

sharedPost.text:
𝗠𝗮𝘆 𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻? 𝗬𝗘𝗦! May Summer Acting with Dancing Workshop ang Acting Core sa lugar kung saan ang pag-arte at pagsayaw ang matututunan! Matuto umarte ng pang-television, film, at commercial kasama ang FAMAS actor na si 𝗔𝗱𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗱𝗼. Learn Hip-hop dance for beginners with our new instructor 𝗝𝗼𝘀𝗵𝘂𝗮 𝗟𝗶𝗺, to push your limits and unlock your full performance energy using your body. 🌴☀️

What’s inside our Summer Workshop? 
✅Acting training for Television, film, and commercials.
✅Experience being part of our workshop’s final performance, “Stranded on an Island.”
✅Basic Hip-hop dance Workshop.
✅Dance Recital at the end of the session.
✅Plus exciting surprise inclusions!

👦Open to ages 8 - 15 years old! With or without experience is okay!

📆How to enroll? Register through our GForm Link -> https://forms.gle/gT7sUTXyWC2zSv579

❗️ Reserve your slot early and get a discount! 

#actingcore #summerworkshop #workshopph

items.text:
[KRAKÓW]
Poszukuję aktorki w wieku 20-25 LAT

Projekt to kampania społeczna na temat zdrowia- scenki aranżowanej sondy ulicznej wśród kobiet. Materiały w formie krótkich reels na social media.

📍 Nagrania: 23.04 (czwartek)
godziny: ok. 11:30-16:00

Stawka: 800 zł netto

Produkcja nie przewiduje zwrotu kosztów logistycznych.

❗️Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób, które na pewno mogą być w tym terminie i tych godzinach w Krakowie i które akceptują wszystkie warunki.

Zgłoszenie zawierające:
- zdjęcie portretowe i zdjęcie sylwetki
- krótkie video z mówieniem do kamery (np. wizytówka)
przesyłać na adres: [casting@krakrafilms.com](mailto:casting@krakrafilms.com)

items.text:
#pilne #płatne DOMÓWKA SENIORÓW  

Cześć! Do sesji promocyjnej w klimacie imprezy na działce szukam energicznych i oryginalnych seniorów.

Zdjęcia 18.04 (jutro), godziny 10-15:30 - Warszawa

Poszukiwane role (60+):
1. Senior statysta - stawka 150 zł
Rola: Członek klubu seniorów. Otwarty i rozrywkowy, bierze aktywny udział w imprezie w ogrodzie.

Opłacamy wyżywienie i ewentualne koszty transportu.

Zainteresowanych proszę o zgłoszenia w wiadomościach prywatnych z:
- aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki
- wizytówką
- wiekiem
- wzrostem i wymiarami

items.text: Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic

sharedPost.text:
Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic. To będą pojedyncze sceny, więc plany zdjęciowe nie będą trwały długo. Zdjęcia w Poznaniu w dniach od 28 kwietnia do 2 maja. Wynagrodzenie 201 zł brutto (189 zł na rękę).

KOGO SZUKAMY?
Na wtorek 28.04:
- Postawnych, wysokich mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Panów którzy wcielą się w postacie porywaczy/przestępców
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy
- Lokaja/Kamerdynera najlepiej o szpakowatych włosach
- Kelnera
- Kobiet i mężczyzn - klientów restauracji

Na środę 29.04:
- Postawnych, mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Kobietę i mężczyznę – pracowników biurowych
- Kobietę, pacjentkę w szpitalu
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na czwartek 30.04
- 20 kobiet i mężczyzn którzy wcielą się w rolę dziennikarzy

Na piątek  1.05
- Ochroniarza

Na sobotę 2.05
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na zgłoszenia czekamy do piątku 24.04 do godziny 9:00 rano.
Formularz do zgłoszenia oraz link do trailela w komentarzu

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'n.Π Do serialu poszukujemy dorosłych Statystów- kobiet i mężczyzn Zdjęcia w dniach 28.04-2.05.2026 w Poznaniu. Szczegóły w opisie B N >>> link do zgłoszenia w komentarzu <<< 8'

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

**OSTATNI DZIEŃ I OSTATNIA SZANSA, ABY WZIĄĆ UDZIAŁ W PLANIE FILMU „KOSMONAUTA”**

 

Szukamy Statystów, **MĘŻCZYZN ok. 20-65 lat** do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych o znanym Polaku.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)**

** **

Charakteryzacja 28 lub 29.04 – termin do potwierdzenia

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Kamed Studio DOSZUKUJEMY!!

21 kwietnia (to już jutro)
Stawka 120 zł. płatne gotówką po planie 

Gramy w Milanówku 🙂 scenę chrzcin 

Na plan nowego serialu szukamy Pana w wieku około50 lat, który wcieli się w rolę członka rodziny bohaterów serialu. 
Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie zgłoszenia na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać 
- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- informację skąd jesteś 
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- aktualne zdjęcie (twarz I sylwetka)

items.text:
NOW CASTING:

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
Thinking about getting into voiceover but not based in Dublin?
We’re often asked about online options by people living in remote areas or those who simply can’t make it to an in-person class. So this June, we’re opening up our Online Introduction to Voiceover with PBL Voiceover Coach. Ireland's most highly rated Voiceover Coach. 

This affordable session is designed to give you a real, honest impression of what it takes to work in professional voiceover. No fluff, just practical insight, guided exercises, and direction from an industry professional.

What you’ll get:

A clear understanding of how the voiceover industry works

Live coaching and performance feedback

Tips on script interpretation and delivery

Insight into recording setups and audio quality

A chance to ask questions and get personalised guidance

If you have a USB microphone, great, it’ll help you get even more out of the session. But it’s not essential. You can still take part and learn a huge amount without one.

Places are deliberately kept very limited to ensure everyone gets proper attention and feedback.

If you’ve been curious about voiceover, this is your chance to step in and try it properly.

Book your place now:

https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach/

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - COLORADO FEATURE FILM**

DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE

*After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.*

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives.

Writer/Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain & Jill Coats

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

Locations: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO

**Roles:**

**Sonia ***Lead*

65-72 / Female

Sonia is a 67 year old free spirit who’s spent the last 30 years or so kicking it around Boulder, Colorado after she graduated from Naropa. She’s a sex positive, free wheeling bohemian, who spent the majority of the early 70s trying to relive the 60s. Lots of acid and counter-cultural literature, Grateful Dead shows and the like, until she became a mom. That’s Sonia’s past though. We meet Sonia in the present day; after the death of her beloved husband, Michael, she has plenty of alone time to look back on her full life before her adult son, Ezra, moves back in. Sonia purports strength and wisdom, but really, she seems to be grieving the loss of youth. As she looks at her mortality squarely, she decides to take things into her own hands, and she sets out to end her own life through Medical Aid in Dying, even though she doesn’t exactly qualify…
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Ezra ***Lead*

30-36 / Male

Ezra is a 34 year old man who – more often than not – has something to say about, well, everything. He has an MFA in Creative Writing & PhD in Postmodern Literature from Denver University, and he’s got a whole bunch of opinions on what makes up a valuable opinion. He’s the kind of guy who’s quick to comment on why a certain book or film is low brow, and he's hellbent on being the smartest guy in the room – even if it’s at the expense of those around him. He’s a “writer” but really, lately, he’s a professor that writes. We meet Ezra at quite the inflection point in his life – his wife has left him, he’s moved back in with his mother (whom he has an irrationally short fuse with) and he’s recently been placed on sabbatical for the upcoming semester. Ezra’s looking for answers, even if he won’t admit it until he absolutely must.
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Hayduke ***Supporting*

65-75 / Male

Hayduke is a 70 year old male. Ex-hippie, Grateful Dead fan, very counter cultural. Strong comedic skills preferred.

* Rate: ~$1,500 Project Flat
* Duration: ~3 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/12 - 7/14

_______________________________________
Thank you for your interest in our project! Please submit here:
[[[https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)

Please keep an eye out for more roles and updates in the coming weeks. Cheers!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – EMERGENCY RE-CAST
**Production:** *“A: An Emotional Immersive Experience” on Mental Health, Addiction and Self-Help*
**Role:** Chester (or Kate). the pulse of the piece. Raw, honest, and unfiltered. A teenager navigating mental health, identity, and the pressure to be “okay” in a world that rarely slows down. This role carries vulnerability, humor, and emotional weight—often breaking the fourth wall and speaking directly to the audience like they’re the only person in the room.

**CASTING DETAILS**
* Must **believably look like a teenager (no older than 19)**
* **Male or Female** (if female, role will be named *Kate*)
* Strong emotional range, comfort with audience interaction, and grounded authenticity required

**TIMELINE (FAST & FURIOUS ⚡)**
* **Emergency re-cast** – auditions will be scheduled at the **first available openings**
* **Casting decision made by Friday, April 24**

**REHEARSALS**
* Primarily **via Zoom until mid-May**
* Transition to in-person rehearsals closer to departure

**PERFORMANCE COMMITMENT**
* Must be fully available to perform in **Edinburgh at the 93rd Annual Festival Fringe (August 2026)**
* This is an international performance opportunity—high energy, high visibility, high impact

**IMPORTANT NOTES**
* **Fundraising participation is REQUIRED** (this is a team effort—everyone helps move the ship 🚢)
* **Talent is responsible for securing their own airfare upfront**. If fundraising goals are met, **reimbursement will be provided**

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL:
The Upside-Down Table apart of the blueprint 2026 Festival (series B) is casting two roles for a 10 minute play. It will take place in East Point, GA.

REE - a niece - Teenager to early 40’s  

ZEE - a mover - Any age. but prefer late 20’s and older. 

A little about the play: 

When Ree's aunt passes away leaving her to deal with what's left, she must solve the problem of what to do with a very strange object left in the middle of the house. The movers are nearly finished clearing out the house, but Ree just can't seem to figure out the "puzzle" her aunt left her.

Current Rehearsal Schedule:

April 29th, 30th, May 1st | Time TBD

May 4th, 5th, 6th | Time TBD

   *Wednesday, May 6 | 6:00 PM – B Series Mandatory Dress

Series B Performance Schedule:

Friday, May 8 | 7:00 PM – Series B (Opening Night)

Saturday, May 9 | 3:30 PM – Series B (Closing Matinee)

Rates & Comps: 

Actors: $50 one time (Paid at last show)

Any extra income the festival brings in will be divided amongst the actors

All actors receive 1 comp ticket and will have a code.

For those interested, please email your resume, headshot, (and, if available, a comedic monologue) to jonnaleanne@gmail.com or sagefloyd33@gmail.com

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL for a SHORT fantasy film - PAID roles- CHICAGO **

**PROJECT TITLE: Shed**

**PROJECT TYPE:** Short film Drama/Fantasy

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Searching Productions

**PRODUCTION TEAM: Writer/Director - Stephanie Jeter; EP - Lilly Wachowski**

**UNION STATUS: **Open to union and non-union actors -**PAID**

**PROJECT SYNOPSIS:** A couple’s harmonious relationship begins to unravel when the woman comes home to unexpectedly find a locked shed in her back yard and a husband who won’t tell her what’s inside.

**LOCATION**: Chicago, IL or surrounding area (exact location TBD)

**SHOOT DATES: June 1-June 7**

**ROLES:**

**These roles are for actors local to Chicagoland only**

**LAYLA** - woman, 30-39, Black: A high-achieving soror type whose curiosity might be getting the best of her. 

**RANDALL** - man, 30-39, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: An easygoing and sensitive man in the midst of an identity crisis. 

**LITTLE BOY** - boy, 8-11, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: Newly recovered from a battle with a life-threatening illness he tries his best to present a brave face for his family. (This is a non-speaking role.)

EXPECTED HOURS: TBD

ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION: Transportation reimbursement (capped)

**SUBMISSION DETAILS: Please send a head shot, resume, and reel (if available) to** **ShedFilmChi@gmail.com**, 

**SUBJECT:  ‘Cast submission -***** Role*****’.** 

**Please submit no later than April 29, 2026.**

**If you are invited to audition, we will provide sides and ask that you submit a self-taped audition.*

**CALL BACKS:** Callbacks and chemistry reads will be held between May 4th and May 7th in Chicago.

Follow us on: Instagram **shed.movi**

Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

items.text:
Hi there,
I’m in LA for the next 2-3 weeks shooting scenes for a movie I’m trying to make. Looking for creative teammates and collaborations. 

The premise is my character walking across Los Angeles, Malibu, and California. 

I’m hoping to find creative artists looking to expand their career, promote their brand, and be goofy/entertaining in their role. 

If anyone is interested in being a part of the project, please feel free to dm. 
Cheers, 
Kustom Kyle

items.text:
CASTING CALL: New Project Shooting this August!

Project Title: Shades of Identity

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

The Details
Shoot Date: August 2026

How to Apply: Choose a monologue for the role you’re interested in, record your self-tape, and email it directly to me!

Character Breakdown
We are looking for the following roles:

Lena (16–23): Black/Dark-skinned.

Maya (16–23): Black/Light-skinned.

Ashley (16–23): Plus-size.

Erica (16–23)

Theresa (16–23)

Aaron (16–23): The gay best friend; charismatic and loyal.

Tyla (16–23): The "mean girl" with a colorist attitude.

Camilla (16–23): Tyla’s sidekick.

Mr. Jones (45–55): The father figure; grounded and protective.

Therapist (35–55): Calm, professional, and observant.

Ready to Submit?
Please send your video auditions to: bmg30genzpub@gmail.com 

Tag a friend who would be perfect for one of these roles! We can't wait to see your submissions. 🎥🌟

topComments.text: I will play Mr Mr jones like the song goes lol lol

items.text:
Playbox Productions – Seeking Collaborators for Upcoming Production!
> 🚨 **URGENT CALL** 🚨

**PLAYBOX PRODUCTIONS** is seeking production team members for an upcoming play in 2026 (to be announced).

This will be an **intimate, small-cast production**, focused on grounded, truthful work and a strong ensemble process.

> **TO APPLY:**
1. Send your Resume, and Website (if applicable) to:
**playboxpgh@gmail.com**
2. Include your availability for the production timeline, especially tech and performances.
3. And ask us any questions you may have!

> **Timeline:**
* Rehearsals: August 3 – September 13 (Strip District)
* Tech + Performances: September 14 – October 4 (Downtown Pittsburgh)

> All roles are **volunteer/contract-based**, with the intention of paying cast and crew per production. Compensation is **contingent on overall budget and ticket sales**.
> For reference, we were able to compensate our team during our sold-out run of *1984* in December 2025.
> Members of the Playbox community have worked with City Theatre, The Public Theater, The Pittsburgh Cultural Trust, Carnegie Mellon, Point Park, CLO, The Talent Group, and the 48 Hour Play Festival, to name a few. Please see roles below.

## **Currently Seeking:**

> **Production Manager**

Oversees the logistical and operational execution of the production from pre-production through closing.
* Coordinates schedules and timelines
* Manages logistics and communication
* Supports rehearsals and performances
* Acts as liaison between artistic and technical teams
> **Director**
* Develops and executes the artistic vision
* Leads rehearsals and guides performers
* Collaborates with designers and production staff
> **Stage Manager**
* Runs rehearsals and performances
* Tracks blocking, cues, and notes
* Maintains reports and team communication
> **Assistant Stage Managers (ASM)**
* Assist with rehearsal setup and breakdown
* Help track props, cues, and backstage needs
* Support communication and organization during rehearsals, tech, and shows
> **Designers (Set, Props Asst., Sound, & Lighting Designers)**

Collaborate with the director and team to shape the visual and technical elements of the production.

* Design and execute assigned elements
* Work closely with director and technical team
* Participate in meetings and tech rehearsals

## **Additional Roles We Are Seeking:**

> **Producers**

Support overall coordination, planning, and execution of the production alongside the Playbox team.
> **Construction / Set Builders**

Assist in building and assembling scenic elements to bring the set design to life.
> **Fight Director**

Design and safely choreograph staged physical moments and ensure actor safety.
> **Board Operators**

Run lighting or sound cues during performances.
> **Marketing Manager**

Leads the programming & promotion the production through social media, content, and audience outreach.

Thank You!

We look forward to your application and will be in touch shortly if interested via email or phone call.

**The Playbox Team, 2026**
Office #: (412) 282-3916
*[Website Currently Under Construction]*

items.text:
WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

30% of our actors self-taped for one of the UK’s most loved TV soaps.
50+ PAID opportunities dropped into the group.

And one actor…
Asked how to price herself —
…and walked away billing DOUBLE 💰

This is what happens when you’re in the right room.

Actors outside are waiting.
Actors inside are moving.

The ones inside right now?
They’re on fire 🔥

If you’re serious about your acting career…
Stop watching from the outside.

👉 https://www.mzacting.com/matt-zinas-inner-circle.html
👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#actorslife #selftape #actingcareer #ukactors #auditions

50+ PAID opportunities dropped into the group.

And one actor…
Asked how to price herself —
…and walked away billing DOUBLE 💰

This is what happens when you’re in the right room.

Actors outside are waiting.
Actors inside are moving.

The ones inside right now?
They’re on fire 🔥

If you’re serious about your acting career…
Stop watching from the outside.

👉 https://www.mzacting.com/matt-zinas-inner-circle.html
👉 https://linktr.ee/mattzina

#actorslife #selftape #actingcareer #ukactors #auditions
items.title: WEEKLY ROUNDUP 🎬

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
Lights, camera… action 🎬
A real day in the life at Majestic, straight from our Acting for Screen sessions, LIVE with our students.
From script to screen, our students step into character, build confidence on camera, and bring stories to life in a professional setting. Every take is a chance to grow, learn, and shine.
🎥 On set energy
🎭 Real performances
🎤 Honest student moments
No filters, just raw talent and dedication.

This is what it looks like behind the scenes at Majestic, students out on the spot.

#MajesticLive #ActingForScreen #DayInTheLife #OnSet #FutureStars #DramaSchool #BehindTheScenes

Sam 50+ bisexual  female character 

The sister 45+ a confident femaleperson

We are actively encouraging submissions from actors with lived experiences of the LGBTQIA+ community. 

If interested in auditioning please email

items.text:
Casting call for feature film by Jeremiah Zagar. 

SEEKING: Boys ages 5-9. Any ethnicity. No acting experience or training necessary. English required. French familiarity a plus! 

SUBMIT: Email skrobecasting@gmail.com 
* Subject line: Painted Bride - [your child's name] 
* Include parent/guardian contact info, including location 
* Child name, age. 
* Include a photo - and a video starting with a slate, and telling us about yourself, and an experience you've had with an animal (it can be anything - we just want to hear you tell a story) 
* Nationwide call. 

Any questions please email - I will not respond on Facebook.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text

topComments.text: Oh my god are they doing a film about Isaiah Zagar?! I’m a Philly native and my son and I just visited the garden together for the first time. This is incredible!!!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – MODELE / AKTORZY 🎬
Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn do udziału w nagraniu reklamy dla kliniki psychologicznej w Poznaniu.  

📍 Lokalizacja: Poznań  

📅 Termin: niedziela, 26 kwietnia  

💸 Stawka: 200 zł / godz.  

Szukamy osób swobodnie czujących się przed kamerą, z naturalną energią i autentycznością – zależy nam na prawdziwych emocjach, nie „sztywnym” aktorstwie.  

📌 Wymagana zgoda na wykorzystanie wizerunku w celach promocyjnych kliniki.  

📩 Zgłoszenia: napisz komentarz pod postem i dodaj link do swojego Instagrama lub portfolio.

items.text:
Hi industry folks,

Room for new students has become available at my studio.  I'd love to offer those spots to serious actors who dream big!  

I'm originally ￼from NY and have been teaching in LA for two decades, successfully and safely, tucked away in a convenient, private studio with unlimited parking. Now internationally online as well.  ￼

I help produce working actors at a very high level, launching the careers of many series regulars, and bona fide movie stars, some achieving A-list status. 

Check out the website for testimony and success stories at
www.laurenpatricenadlerstudios.com

Reach out directly at 
Laurenpatricenadler@gmail.com

And follow on Instagram at @LaurenPatriceNadlerStudio
Where the stars are always rising!

I love working with people who dream big 🙂 LPN Studios, where the stars are always rising.

items.title: Hi industry folks,

items.text:
Auditions for The Spitfire Grill
Auditions!!!

The Spitfire Grill-The Musical

Music and Book by James Valcq 

Lyrics and Book by Fred Alley

Directed by Ella Wyatt

Monday, April 27 @ 7pm

Callbacks: by invitation Wednesday, April 29 @ 7pm

Synopsis:

The musical depicts the journey of a young woman just released from prison, who decides to start her life anew in a rural town in Wisconsin. She participates in a journey within the town toward its own tenuous reawakening.

Please prepare a song of your choice, an accompanist will be provided. 32 bars

Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.

Cold reading sides will be provided at auditions.

Performances: July 10 to August 2, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm

Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees July 18 and August 1 at 2:00pm

Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente

Mon–Thurs, 7:00pm, with some Saturdays

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

(Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.)

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.

There is a $100 stipend offered

Character Breakdown can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaUN0c1JhV29JMUFpUWN1NXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5u2s8JPZvLnjKtydEhs6BkHxK8l8k9R3IXSoE2NwpyZkIXOADty48E_oY5Nw_aem_5edgXDemxfi2rbHAIpzVEQ)

This Sunday 26th April.

sharedPost.text:
EXCLUSIVE Free Acting Training with Michael Keogh (@instakeogh) of Peaky Blinders, BBC Casualty and Marvel’s Secret Invasion.

If you want to know:

✅ What casting directors want
✅The key factor to absolutely nail your self-tape
✅ Exactly what to do if you can’t cry or react the way you want to on cue 
✅ The single reason why you aren’t booking the roles you want (it’s something 99% of actors miss)

This class is for YOU.

Sunday 26th April — you’ll also get a $97 free gift for attending.

RSVP at the link below to reserve your place on our Exclusive Free Masterclass

https://bit.ly/4pCzU5V

#actor #actress #actingcoach #nycactor #britishactor

items.text:
Hey guys! New update regarding Lobo Oscuro; a short film that I’m acting in! Please read through the details carefully! No need to DM me!

CASTING CALL – Lobo Oscuro  (Short Film)

We are currently casting for an upcoming short film Lobo Oscuro, shooting near the Lake District (UK). All roles are paid, with travel, accommodation, and catering provided, plus IMDb credit.

Roles Available:

Adolpha

- Playing age: 25–29
- Height: 5’2”–5’5”
- Build: Slim
- Appearance: Tanned complexion, dark hair, brown eyes

Feroz

- Playing age: 25–29
- Height: 6ft+
- Build: Athletic
- Appearance: Long hair, facial hair

Crew Needed:

Camera Operator

- Experience operating professional film equipment preferred

Sound Recordist

- Experience with on-location sound recording required

Production Details:

- Project: Short Film
- Shooting Date: TBC
- Location: Near the Lake District, UK
- Compensation: Paid roles
- Travel, accommodation, and meals provided
- IMDb credit included

If interested, please submit your details, headshots (for cast), CV/portfolio (for crew), and availability via DM to Damien Lanceley!

We look forward to hearing from you!

sharedPost.text:
🎪 Le Nouveau Cirque Triomphe recherche des artistes pour sa tournée de maintenant jusqu’à fin novembre !

Nous étudions toutes les propositions :
• jonglage
• équilibre
• magie
• clown
• danse
• acrobatie au sol
• numéro original ou visuel

⚠️ Pas de numéro aérien.
⚠️ Deux à trois numéros minimum demandés.
🚐 Caravane à disposition.
📄 Documents européens obligatoires.

Nous recherchons des artistes sérieux, motivés et disponibles pour travailler dans une ambiance familiale et professionnelle.

Si vous êtes intéressé(e), merci de me contacter en message privé avec :
• votre spécialité
• quelques photos ou vidéos
• votre expérience
• vos disponibilités

N’hésitez pas à partager autour de vous ! 🎭

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – BL Vertical Drama (Paid Project)（just Asian faces）【just boys 】
Actors who can attend in-person interviews in Thailand in the near future are welcome to submit their applications! Make sure to look dashing and handsome!

(한국 、日本 ประเทศไทย people）

We are casting for a vertical short drama (BL genre).

📍 Shooting Location: China / Thailand  

📅 Shooting Duration: 7 days  

🎭 Role: Male Lead (BL)

Requirements:

- Male, visual age 17—25

- Tall, handsome, strong facial features (good on camera)  

- Korean / Japanese / Thai (based in Thailand preferred)  

- Basic Chinese is a plus  

- Acting experience not required, but must have good on-screen presence  

- Able to perform romantic chemistry (including kissing scenes)  

- Natural masculine vibe (not overly feminine)  

- Not signed / or open to signing preferred  

💰 Budget: 2000–2500 RMB (full project)

We welcome newcomers / influencers / models.

📩 Contact:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— THAI ———

🎬 เปิดรับนักแสดง – ซีรีส์วาย (แนวตั้ง) มีค่าตอบแทน

📍 สถานที่ถ่ายทำ: จีน / ไทย 

📅 ระยะเวลาถ่ายทำ: 7 วัน  

🎭 บท: นักแสดงนำชาย  

คุณสมบัติ:

- ผู้ชาย อายุภาพลักษณ์ 17—25ปี  

- สูง หน้าตาดี โครงหน้าชัด กล้องขึ้น  

- คนไทย / เกาหลี / ญี่ปุ่น (ที่อยู่ในไทยจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ)  

- พูดภาษาจีนเบื้องต้นได้จะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ  

- ไม่จำเป็นต้องมีประสบการณ์ แต่ต้องมีเสน่ห์หน้ากล้อง  

- สามารถเล่นฉากโรแมนติกและฉากจูบได้  

- บุคลิกแมน เป็นธรรมชาติ  

- ยังไม่สังกัดค่าย หรือพร้อมเซ็นสัญญา  

💰 ค่าตอบแทน: 2000–2500 RMB  

📩 ติดต่อ:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— KOREAN ———

🎬 캐스팅 공고 – BL 세로형 드라마 (유료 프로젝트)

📍 촬영 장소: 중국 / 태국  

📅 촬영 기간: 7일  

🎭 역할: 남자 주연  

지원 조건:

- 남성, 비주얼 나이 17—25세  

- 키 크고 잘생긴 외모, 또렷한 이목구비  

- 태국 거주 한국인 / 일본인 / 태국인 우대  

- 간단한 중국어 가능자 우대  

- 연기 경험 없어도 지원 가능 (카메라 존재감 중요)  

- 키스신 및 로맨스 연기 가능자  

- 자연스럽고 남성적인 이미지  

- 미계약자 또는 계약 가능자 

💰 출연료: 2000~2500 RMB  

📩 연락처:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

——— JAPANESE ———

🎬 キャスティング募集 – BL縦型ドラマ（有料案件）

📍 撮影場所: 中国 / タイ  

📅 撮影期間: 7日間  

🎭 役: 男性主演 

応募条件:

- 男性、見た目年齢17—25歳  

- 高身長、整った顔立ち、カメラ映えする方  

- タイ在住の日本人 / 韓国人 / タイ人優先  

- 簡単な中国語ができる方歓迎  

- 演技経験不問（存在感重視）  

- キスシーン可能な方  

- 自然で男性的な雰囲気  

- 未所属、または契約可能な方  

💰 ギャラ: 2000〜2500 RMB  

📩 連絡先:

Instagram: Liqinyao412  

LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/K8YPESE6EB

Just Asian faces.

items.text:
URENT CASTING CALL:
The Upside-Down Table apart of the blueprint 2026 Festival (series B) is casting two roles for a 10 minute play. It will take place in East Point, GA.

REE - a niece - Teenager to early 40’s  

ZEE - a mover - Any age. but prefer late 20’s and older. 

A little about the play: 

When Ree's aunt passes away leaving her to deal with what's left, she must solve the problem of what to do with a very strange object left in the middle of the house. The movers are nearly finished clearing out the house, but Ree just can't seem to figure out the "puzzle" her aunt left her.

Current Rehearsal Schedule:

April 29th, 30th, May 1st | Time TBD

May 4th, 5th, 6th | Time TBD

   *Wednesday, May 6 | 6:00 PM – B Series Mandatory Dress

Series B Performance Schedule:

Friday, May 8 | 7:00 PM – Series B (Opening Night)

Saturday, May 9 | 3:30 PM – Series B (Closing Matinee)

Rates & Comps: 

Actors: $50 one time (Paid at last show)

Any extra income the festival brings in will be divided amongst the actors

All actors receive 1 comp ticket and will have a code.

For those interested, please email your resume, headshot, (and, if available, a comedic monologue) to jonnaleanne@gmail.com or sagefloyd33@gmail.com

items.text:
NOW CASTING:
Looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Looking for different actors of all ages to volunteer to be background actors in one short scene filming in the Los Angeles area June 30th.

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Filming in the Los Angeles / SFV area. 

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
CASTING CALL: PAID SHORT FILM
We are currently casting for a Canada Council / BC Arts Council-funded short film set for production in late May. Details below!

**LOGLINE**: On her final shift at her family’s struggling business, a young woman grapples with mounting guilt as she prepares to leave for university, knowing it will mean leaving her immigrant parents behind.

**PRODUCTION DATES**: Tuesday, May 19th - Sunday, May 24th, 2026

**RATES**: $200 per day

Both **UNION AND NON-UNION** encouraged to submit!

We are looking for the following characters:

**MAMAN** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker.

Maman is a sharp, no-nonsense mother who is practical, blunt, and often unintentionally funny. Beneath it all is someone who has sacrificed deeply and holds everything together, expressing her love through control, criticism, and constant caretaking.

**BABA** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker. Aloof, kind, often in his own world.

Baba is a gentle, soft-spoken man who was once educated and respected but has quietly let that life go. He is polite and peacekeeping, with a quiet dignity shaped by sacrifice, and only pushes back when he has to.

**Please submit your materials to eastvancasting@gmail.com**

Thank you!

## **CASTING CALL: BACKGROUND PERFORMERS (PAID* - Non union) 🎬**

We are looking for various background roles for an upcoming vertical production filming in **Richmond** **on April 21st, 2026.**

**❗️Please read the requirements carefully before applying.**
* **POLICE OFFICER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **REPORTER / VINTAGE CROWD:** Male, age: 18+
